originalTitle: Here are 38 Memorial Day deals we recommend for $50 or less
summary: Massive OLED TVs and Sonos speakers might be stealing the Memorial Day spotlight, but there are also plenty of great deals that won’t set you back nearly as much. In fact, some of the best discounts we’re seeing are on gadgets that retail for $50 or less, from portable chargers and 4K streaming devices to […]
content: Massive OLED TVs and Sonos speakers might be stealing the Memorial Day spotlight, but there are also plenty of great deals that won’t set you back nearly as much. In fact, some of the best discounts we’re seeing are on gadgets that retail for $50 or less, from portable chargers and 4K streaming devices to cheap(ish) security cameras. There are even some solid deals available on outdoor gear if you plan to spend time camping, hiking, or otherwise enjoying the outdoors this summer. To help you separate the good from the bad, we’ve taken the liberty to comb through thousands of deals to find an assortment of discounted products that have earned The Verge stamp of approval, whether it be a portable Bluetooth speaker, a video game, or a water filter. If you’re not beholden to $50, be sure to check out our definitive roundup of the best Memorial Day deals, which we’ll update throughout the weekend. Featured Products CMF Buds Pro 2 SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable Mpowerd Luci Solar String Lights: Color Xbox Wireless Controller Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Plus MSR PocketRocket 2 Stove Anker Nano Charger (45W, Smart Display, 180° Foldable) Twelve South AirFly Pro 2 [Product: CMF Buds Pro 2 | https://www.amazon.com/CMF-Buds-Pro-Cancelling-Technology/dp/B0D83J6JJ9/?tag=theverge02-20, https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.nothing.tech%2Fproducts%2Fcmf-buds-pro-2%3FColour%3DOrange] [Product: Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Plus | https://www.amazon.com/Amazon-newest-AI-powered-Search-million/dp/B0F7Z4QZTT/?tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Famazon-fire-tv-stick-4k-plus-newest-model-ai-powered-fire-tv-search-wi-fi-6-streaming-device-8-gb-free-live-tv-black%2FJ39TLS6QVZ%2Fsku%2F6644638, https://goto.target.com/c/482924/81938/2092?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.target.com%2Fp%2Famazon-fire-tv-stick-4k-2024%2F-%2FA-91651394] * If you want more speed and storage than the Fire TV Stick 4K Plus offers, the 4K Max is on sale for $39.99 ($20 off) at Amazon and Best Buy, which is $5 shy of its all-time low. It, too, runs on the new and improved Fire TV OS and supports Dolby Vision, HDR10 Plus, and Dolby Atmos. However, it offers faster performance, double the storage (16GB), and Wi-Fi 6E support. It also comes with a more capable remote, the Alexa Voice Remote Enhanced, which adds a button for live TV channel listings. Read our review. * If you want a small portable speaker, JBL’s Clip 5 is on sale for around $59 ($20 off) at REI, Amazon, and Best Buy, which is $10 shy of its all-time low. The Bluetooth speaker features an integrated carabiner that makes it easy to clip onto a backpack, bike, or beach bag, along with an IP67 waterproof and dustproof rating. It also offers up to 12 hours of battery life per charge, so it should easily last you the day. [Product: Sony SRS-XB100 | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0C29CL98P/?tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fsite%2Fsony-xb100-compact-bluetooth-speaker-black%2F6538164.p, https://goto.target.com/c/482924/81938/2092?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.target.com%2Fp%2Fsony-xb100-compact-bluetooth-speaker-black%2F-%2FA-91963081] [Product: Xbox Wireless Controller | https://www.amazon.com/Xbox-Wireless-Gaming-Controller-Headsets-Console/dp/B0F1HTGDTL?tag=theverge02-20, https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fip%2FMicrosoft-Xbox-Wireless-Controller-Carbon-Black%2F15074463540, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fmicrosoft-xbox-wireless-controller-for-xbox-series-x-xbox-series-s-xbox-one-pcs-and-cloud-enabled-devices-robot-white%2FJJGXPXQ2VS] [Product: Star Wars Outlaws | https://www.amazon.com/Star-Wars-Outlaws-Gold-Nintendo-Switch/dp/B0F79Z9V31/?tag=theverge02-20, https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fip%2FStar-Wars-Outlaws-PlayStation-5%2F5439978114%3F, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fsite%2Fstar-wars-outlaws-standard-edition-playstation-5%2F6578448.p%3F] * You can buy the physical version of Assassin’s Creed Shadows for the PlayStation 5 or Xbox Series X at Best Buy and Target for $34.99 ($15 off). The open-world game follows a shinobi assassin and a powerful samurai caught in the midst of political unrest in feudal Japan. Its stealth mechanics are intuitive, and there’s a satisfying amount of action, too. Read our review. [Product: Anker Nano Travel Adapter (5-in-1, 20W) | https://www.amazon.com/Anker-Adapter-Temperature-Compatible-Countries/dp/B0DHVNW1CN/?tag=theverge02-20, https://www.amazon.com/Anker-Adapter-Temperature-Compatible-Countries/dp/B0DHVNPN7J/?tag=theverge02-20, https://anker.pxf.io/c/482924/1543964/18023?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.anker.com%2Fproducts%2Fa9215%3Fvariant%3D44790594044054] [Product: Anker Nano Charger (45W, Smart Display, 180° Foldable) | https://www.amazon.com/Anker-Charging-Foldable-Recognition-Non-Battery/dp/B0G1MRLXMV?tag=theverge02-20, https://anker.pxf.io/c/482924/1543964/18023?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.anker.com%2Fproducts%2Fa121d-45w-usb-c-fast-charger-foldable-plug-compact] * If you need a reliable power bank, Anker’s Zolo Magnetic Power Bank (10,000mAh) is on sale for $39.99 ($10 off) at Amazon, which is $10 shy of its all-time low. The small battery pack can wirelessly charge iPhones at up to 7.5W, while the built-in USB-C cable delivers up to 30W fast charging for devices. It also doubles as an adjustable stand, making it handy for watching videos or keeping an eye on notifications while charging. * If you own an older iPhone with a Lightning port, you can grab InfinityLab’s InstantGo 10,000 Power Bank for just $41.93 (about $28 off) at REI. The portable battery features a 10,000mAh capacity and a built-in Lightning cable, making it a solid all-in-one option for days when you won’t be near an outlet. It also suppo
chineseTitle: 以下是我们推荐的 38 项阵亡将士纪念日优惠，价格不超过 50 美元
chineseSummary: 大型 OLED 电视和 Sonos 扬声器可能会成为阵亡将士纪念日的焦点，但也有很多超值优惠，不会让您失望。事实上，我们看到的一些最好的折扣是零售价 50 美元或以下的小工具，从便携式充电器和 4K 流媒体设备到 [...]
chineseContent: 大型 OLED 电视和 Sonos 扬声器可能会成为阵亡将士纪念日的焦点，但也有很多超值优惠，不会让您失望。事实上，我们看到的一些最好的折扣是零售价 50 美元或以下的小工具，从便携式充电器和 4K 流媒体设备到便宜的安全摄像头。如果您计划在今年夏天露营、徒步旅行或以其他方式享受户外活动，甚至还有一些户外装备的优惠活动。为了帮助您区分好坏，我们冒昧地梳理了数千个交易，找到了各种获得 The Verge 认可的折扣产品，无论是便携式蓝牙扬声器、视频游戏还是滤水器。如果您不想花 50 美元，请务必查看我们对阵亡将士纪念日最佳优惠的最终汇总，我们将在整个周末更新。特色产品 CMF Buds Pro 2 SwitchBot Bot 可充电 Mpowerd Luci 太阳能灯串：彩色 Xbox 无线控制器 Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Plus MSR PocketRocket 2 炉子 Anker Nano 充电器（45W，智能显示屏，180° 可折叠） 十二南 AirFly Pro 2 [产品：CMF Buds Pro 2 | CMF Buds Pro 2] https://www.amazon.com/CMF-Buds-Pro-Cancelling-Technology/dp/B0D83J6JJ9/?tag=theverge02-20， https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.nothing.tech%2Fproducts%2Fcmf-buds-pro-2%3FColour%3DOrange] [产品：Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Plus | https://www.amazon.com/Amazon-newest-AI-powered-Search-million/dp/B0F7Z4QZTT/?tag=theverge02-20， https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Famazon-fire-tv-stick-4k-plu s-最新型号-ai-powered-fire-tv-search-wi-fi-6-streaming-device-8-gb-free-live-tv-black%2FJ39TLS6QVZ%2Fsku%2F6644638， https://
